places.name: Ibirapuera Park Trails
places.description: Tree-lined paths ideal for walking, jogging, and enjoying nature in the heart of São Paulo.

places.name: Museum of Modern Art of São Paulo (MAM)
places.description: A leading museum featuring modern and contemporary Brazilian art exhibitions.
places.average_cost: $5–$10 USD (may be free on certain days)

places.name: Afro Brazil Museum
places.description: A cultural museum dedicated to Afro-Brazilian history, art, and heritage.
places.average_cost: $5–$10 USD (may be free on certain days)

places.name: Japanese Garden (Jardim Japonês)
places.description: A tranquil garden with traditional Japanese landscaping, ponds, and koi fish.

places.name: Bike Paths
places.description: Dedicated cycling lanes throughout the park, perfect for biking and exploring.

places.name: Ibirapuera Lake
places.description: A scenic lake where visitors can relax, watch birds, and enjoy sunset views.

places.name: Ibirapuera Auditorium
places.description: An iconic concert hall designed by Oscar Niemeyer, hosting music and cultural events.

places.name: Praça da Paz
places.description: A peaceful open space perfect for picnics, yoga, and relaxation.
